sa:items.rdfs:label: Outer Tactical Vest
sa:items.sa:description: Standard modern body armor with integrated tactical plating. Provides balanced protection and integrated communication gear.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Integrated communication gear lets user communicate without any external gear

sa:items.rdfs:label: Undercover vest
sa:items.sa:description: Discreet body armor designed to remain hidden beneath clothing. Provides basic protection while maintaining a civilian appearance.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Gain advantage when trying to conceal that you are wearing armor

sa:items.rdfs:label: Boarding shield
sa:items.sa:description: Large boarding shield reinforced against blast waves. Grants advantage on reflex saves against area-of-effect attacks.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: +2 on reflex saves vs AoE effects

sa:items.rdfs:label: Tactical Exoskeleton
sa:items.sa:description: Advanced tactical exoskeleton combining armor and wearable tech. Features integrated communication, visual enhancement systems, and equipment mounting hardpoints.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Integrated communication gear lets user communicate without any external gear. "Google Glass" like functionality.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Scale mail armor
sa:items.sa:description: Traditional armor constructed from overlapping metal scales. Provides reliable protection with reasonable mobility for its coverage level.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Full plate
sa:items.sa:description: Comprehensive plate armor custom-fitted to the wearer's body. Provides exceptional protection at the cost of reduced mobility and maneuverability.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Leather armor
sa:items.sa:description: Flexible armor crafted from specially treated leather. Allows full mobility while providing basic protection.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Synthetic Dragon Scale
sa:items.sa:description: Advanced synthetic scale armor using modern composite materials. Maintains the protective coverage of traditional scales while improving mobility and durability.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Synthetic Dragon Plate
sa:items.sa:description: Contemporary plate armor using advanced composite materials. Focuses protection on vital organs while leaving limbs free for mobility and action.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Plasteel shield
sa:items.sa:description: Space-age composite shield combining durability with reduced weight. Provides standard shield protection and tactical versatility.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Heavy shield
sa:items.sa:description: Traditional wooden or metal shield offering robust protection. Reduces opponent mobility and grants reliable coverage against incoming attacks.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Light shield
sa:items.sa:description: Lightweight traditional shield made from wood or metal. Provides modest protection while maintaining agility and maneuverability.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Tower shield
sa:items.sa:description: Large protective barrier providing exceptional coverage. Offers superior defense against projectiles and area-of-effect attacks, but significantly reduces movement speed.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Advantage on reflex saves versus AoE effects. Movement speed reduced by 10.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Plasteel towershield
sa:items.sa:description: Advanced composite tower shield combining high-tech materials with classic design. Delivers exceptional area-of-effect defense with less movement penalty than traditional tower shields.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Advantage on reflex saves versus AoE effects. Movement speed reduced by 5.
